
### Tool call: browser_navigate

```json
}
```


### Tool call: browser_wait_for
- Args
```json
{
  "time": 4
}
```
- Result
```json
{
  "result": "Waited for 4",
  "code": "await new Promise(f => setTimeout(f, 4 * 1000));",
  "page": "- Page URL: https://vexel.alshifalab.pk/login\n- Page Title: Vexel Operator\n- Console: 1 errors, 0 warnings",
  "snapshot": "```yaml\n- <changed> generic [ref=e1]:\n  - generic [ref=e5]:\n    - banner [ref=e6]:\n      - generic [ref=e7]:\n        - img [ref=e8]\n        - generic [ref=e10]: Vexel Health\n    - main [ref=e11]:\n      - generic [ref=e12]:\n        - generic [ref=e13]:\n          - heading \"Operator Login\" [level=3] [ref=e14]\n          - paragraph [ref=e15]: Sign in to your operator account\n        - generic [ref=e17]:\n          - generic [ref=e18]:\n            - text: Email\n            - textbox \"Email\" [active] [ref=e19]:\n              - /placeholder: you@example.com\n          - generic [ref=e20]:\n            - text: Password\n            - textbox \"Password\" [ref=e21]:\n              - /placeholder: ••••••••\n          - button \"Sign In\" [ref=e22] [cursor=pointer]\n  - region \"Notifications alt+T\"\n  - ref=e4 [unchanged]\n```",
  "events": "- [VERBOSE] [DOM] Input elements should have autocom...o.gl/9p2vKq) %o @ https://vexel.alshifalab.pk/login:0"
}
```

### Tool call: browser_fill_form
- Args
```json
{
  "fields": [
    {
      "name": "Email",
      "type": "textbox",
      "ref": "e19",
      "value": "operator@demo.vexel.pk"
    },
    {
      "name": "Password",
      "type": "textbox",
      "ref": "e21",
      "value": "Operator@demo123!"
    }
  ]
}
```
- Result
```json
{
  "code": "await page.getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Email' }).fill('operator@demo.vexel.pk');\nawait page.getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Password' }).fill('Operator@demo123!');"
}
```

### Tool call: browser_click
- Args
```json
{
  "element": "Sign In button",
  "ref": "e22"
}
```


### Tool call: browser_take_screenshot
- Args
```json
{
  "type": "png",
  "filename": "operator-current.png"
}
```
- Result
```json
{
  "result": "- [Screenshot of viewport](operator-current.png)",
  "code": "// Screenshot viewport and save it as operator-current.png\nawait page.screenshot({\npath: 'operator-current.png',\n  scale: 'css',\n  type: 'png'\n});",
  "attachments": [
    {
      "type": "image",
      "data": "",
      "mimeType": "image/png"
    }
  ]
}
```
